economic_notes: Nation holds 1/6th ownership in Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd. (equity method). Ruby Creek Art Gallery is a fully consolidated subsidiary. Nation located on Lougheed Highway between Hope and Agassiz, BC.
notes: Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,255,888) + CIRNAC ($241,319) + Province of BC ($170,957) + FNESC ($82,009) + Sto:lo Nation ($5,239) + Taxation ($176,901) - noting taxation may not be a transfer but included as government-sourced = $1,932,413 excluding taxation or $1,755,512 excluding taxation and Sto:lo. Used ISC + CIRNAC + BC + FNESC + Sto:lo = $1,755,512 plus gaming revenue $427,269 net approach uncertain. Governance is hereditary (one Chief, one Councillor). 94 total members residing in and outside community. Deferred revenue fully recognized in 2024 (closing balance zero). No schedule of remuneration pages visible in provided images. Segment schedule referenced but not fully visible. Prior accumulated surplus of $14,438,793 includes accumulated remeasurement losses of ($413,975).
